title: heliconia lanata
intro: Heliconia lanata, also known as the fuzzy heliconia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Heliconiaceae. This tropical plant is known for its unique, fuzzy bracts that attract hummingbirds and other pollinators, and its waxy, white flowers. The leaves and roots of Heliconia lanata have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system.
